CREATE TABLE test_strings (string1 String, string2 String);
SELECT byteHammingDistance(string1, string1) AS distance FROM test_strings;
SELECT byteHammingDistance(string1, string2) FROM test_strings WHERE string1 != string2;
SELECT a.string1, byteHammingDistance(a.string1, b.string2) FROM test_strings AS a JOIN test_strings AS b ON a.string1 != b.string2;
SELECT byteHammingDistance((SELECT string1 FROM test_strings WHERE string1 LIKE 'kar%'), (SELECT string2 FROM test_strings WHERE string2 LIKE 'kat%'));
SELECT (SELECT string1 FROM test_strings WHERE string2 = 'kathrin') AS firstString, byteHammingDistance(firstString, 'perfect') AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE string2 = 'kathrin';
SELECT string1, string2, byteHammingDistance(string1, string2) AS hamming_distance FROM (SELECT string1, string2 FROM test_strings) WHERE string1 != '' AND string2 != '';
SELECT string1, byteHammingDistance(string1, '000000') AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE string1 != '';
CREATE TABLE string_pairs AS SELECT string1, string2 FROM test_strings WHERE byteHammingDistance(string1, string2) > 2;
SELECT string1, string2, byteHammingDistance(string1, string2) AS distance FROM string_pairs ORDER BY distance DESC;
